reach.note: SP02 own-spool list. Renders as a classic list (SAPMSSY0/0120): each row is GuiLabel cells lbl[col,row] + a selection chk[1,row]. The spool-number COLUMN varies by layout (col 3 on S/4HANA 400, col 4 elsewhere), so the driver matches the number across ALL labels rather than a fixed column. 'Display contents' is a tbar[1] button (icon B_DISP; F6 here, not F2).

spool CONTENT display, reached from the list via the Display-contents button (icon B_DISP). Only here does 'Save to local file' (icon B_DOWN, btn[48] on the tested release) exist -- it is absent on the list screen (where btn[48] is Select All).
export format chooser after Save (SAPLSPO5 0150, wnd[1]); radio index is dynamic, captured live
